svg.title: CraveKart sequence diagram — real-time GPS tracking via SignalR
svg.desc: Sequence diagram showing a delivery agent sharing GPS coordinates through Delivery.API SignalR hub to the customer's Angular tracking screen in real time
svg.text: WebSocket handshake — order tracking page loads
GPS push loop (repeats while agent is en route)
Status change push (Confirmed / Preparing / Ready / PickedUp / Delivered)
